title: Senior Software Engineer - iGate India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - iGate India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at iGate India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About iGate India:
iGate India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iGate India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
